PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Britta Peterson, via Zoom, for Yuen Man Potasz, Petitioner.

The court and Ms. Peterson discuss the nature of the instant petition with Ms. Peterson reporting on the estate's interest in a property located on 7th Avenue. The court confirms that this estate is being established to receive distributions from the related estate of Evelyn Potasz. The court confirms that the minor heir's birthdate is sometime this summer when she will turn 18.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
